# Oscuro Tintz
> Premium automotive window tinting in Yuba City, CA. Owner-operated, mobile service available, lifetime warranty on every qualifying install.

Oscuro Tintz is an owner-operated window tinting business in Yuba City, California, serving Yuba City, Marysville, Olivehurst, Live Oak, Plumas Lake, Gridley, and Sutter County. Services include HITEK Carbon IR window tinting (from $290), Ceramic IR (from $390, up to 75% infrared heat rejection), and Ceramic Plus (from $500, up to 90% infrared heat rejection), plus tint removal (from $50), windshield tint (from $140), sunroof tint (from $80), panoramic sunroof tint (from $120), and sun strips (from $50). All films block up to 99% of UV. Tint shades available: 2%, 5%, 15%, 20%, 35%, 50%, and 70%. Open Monday–Sunday, 8AM–7PM. Phone: (530) 443-4336. Email: oscurotintz@gmail.com. Online booking with a $30 deposit that applies toward the final invoice.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.oscurotintz.com/): Overview of services, pricing, FAQ, and customer reviews
- [Services](https://www.oscurotintz.com/services): Full service list with film specs and starting prices
- [California Tint Laws](https://www.oscurotintz.com/california-window-tint-laws): Guide to CVC 26708 — legal tint limits in California
- [Mobile Window Tinting](https://www.oscurotintz.com/mobile-window-tinting-yuba-city): Mobile tinting service across Yuba City and Sutter County
- [Gallery](https://www.oscurotintz.com/gallery): Before & after photos of real installs
- [Reviews](https://www.oscurotintz.com/reviews): Customer reviews (5.0 Google rating)
- [About](https://www.oscurotintz.com/about): Owner background and business values
- [Contact](https://www.oscurotintz.com/contact): Contact form, hours, and service area
- [Book](https://www.oscurotintz.com/book): Online appointment booking
